name: Fresh Apple Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, soda and salt onto a platter or waxed paper.
2. In a large bowl, beat oil, sugar, eggs and vanilla at medium speed of electric mixer for 3 or 4 minutes until well blended.
3. Gradually add flour mixture; beat until smooth. Fold in pecans and apples.
4. Pour batter into a greased and floured bundt pan.
5. Bake in a preheated 325°F oven about 1 hour and 20 minutes, or until cake tests done.
6. Cool on wire rack for 20 minutes.
7. Topping: Combine all ingredients and bring to a boil over medium heat; cook 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Spoon or dribble hot sugar mixture over warm cake.
Yield: One 10 inch bundt cake, 24 servings
